task: Redesign unified navigation from radial child-circles with tooltips into a horizontal hierarchical stepper.
goal: Top row = horizontal main stage pills. Click a main stage to reveal 3-4 vertical child pills below it. Click a child pill to expand that same pill into a detail card with title and description.

rules: Only one main stage can be active at a time.
Only one child step can be expanded at a time.
When switching main stage, close previous branch and auto-open first child step of the new stage.
Expanded child step is not a tooltip; it becomes a larger card in place.

desktop: Main stages arranged in one horizontal row.
Child steps appear vertically below active main stage.
Expanded child becomes a card below/in place within the child stack.
mobile: Allow horizontal scroll for main stage row if needed.
Preserve vertical child stack and readable expanded card.

visualRules: No floating child circles around parent nodes.
Use pill-shaped ovals for main and child items.
Active main stage should be visually emphasized.
Expanded child should animate smoothly via height/padding/opacity/transform.
notes: Do not change the source content JSON structure.
Remove dead radial/tooltip CSS and JS related to old behavior.
